feed.title: Current Watches, Warnings and Advisories for New Zealand issued by MetService
feed.rights: Copyright Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited, 2026. Licensed under Creative Commons BY 4.0.

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain are possible, and accumulations may approach warning criteria. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate. Changes: Timing for onset of potentially heavy rain delayed.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain are possible, and accumulations may approach warning criteria. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain are possible, and accumulations may approach warning criteria. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain are possible, and accumulations may approach warning criteria. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate. Changes: Timing for cessation of potentially heavy rain brought forward.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited
